test.name: Verify User Can Signup Successfully

kw.name: Launch Demoblaze Application
kw.msg: Opening browser and launching demoblaze application

kw.name: Verify Signup Success Alert
kw.msg: UnexpectedAlertPresentException: Alert Text: Sign up successful. Message: unexpected alert open: {Alert text : Sign up successful.} (Session info: MicrosoftEdge=148.0.3967.54) Stacktrace: msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff790580f15+e235] msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff790580f74+e294] msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7908fa65a+38797a] msedgedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff79032f5eb] msedgedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7902ea30c] msedgedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7902e9566] msedgedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7902ea133] msedgedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7903b3e49] msedgedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7903b0413] msedgedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7903c0672] msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff79059d498+2a7b8] msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7905a5e86+331a6] msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff790588274+15594] msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff790588395+156b5] msedgedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7905756a3+29c3] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffe18eee8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffe19e4c3fc+2c]
kw.status: UnexpectedAlertPresentException: Alert Text: Sign up successful. test.status: UnexpectedAlertPresentException: Alert Text: Sign up successful.
